intended_review_use: Batoka V6 dark fractured-rock close-range surface analog on project-owned isolated geometry

allowed_now: one-sided project-owned Batoka V6 module material comparison
fixed-camera turntable, closeup, and 60 m review captures
blocked_now: claiming the texture is sampled from Batoka basalt
using the texture as exact named-outcrop or lithology authority
replacing source DEM, riverbed, bank, collision, water, GeoClaw, forcing, or raft-contact authority
corridor substitution before the isolated morphology and closeup gates pass
production promotion before geology, guide, rights, art, repetition, and platform-performance review

import.texture_policy: 2K color remains sRGB; AO, displacement, and roughness import as linear masks; DirectX normal imports as a normal map without green-channel inversion
import.material_policy: V6 C++ creates a one-sided isolated-review material that blends these maps with project-owned morphology and records all tiling and response values
import.promotion_policy: manual only after isolated morphology, surface, geology, guide, rights, art, repetition, and performance review

additional_acquisition_lead.title: Basalt Cliff Rock Scan
additional_acquisition_lead.reason: The listing identifies a real-scale Icelandic basalt scan with 500,000 triangles and 8K-16K PBR maps, but purchase, license selection, source hash, regional morphology suitability, and redistribution terms remain unresolved.
